dsl_rule.translation_notes: Gap breakout detected by comparing current close to previous high/low; high volume verified using hvol_20 (historical 20-bar average); immediate market execution implied by entry on gap confirmation bar; exit on reversal (AUTHOR_SILENT interpreted as close crossing back through entry level); context_dependent direction allows both long (gap up) and short (gap down) based on gap direction; target regime set to TRENDING as specified

backtest_rule.reason: Gap breakout detected by comparing current close to previous high/low; high volume verified using hvol_20 (historical 20-bar average); immediate market execution implied by entry on gap confirmation bar; exit on reversal (AUTHOR_SILENT interpreted as close crossing back through entry level); context_dependent direction allows both long (gap up) and short (gap down) based on gap direction; target regime set to TRENDING as specified

source_rule_text: Enter a trade immediately at the market on a breakaway gap with high volume, as it represents a strong move and sustained change.
